summary: 7 OpenSpec changes planned across 2 priority tiers. MVP = p2-c003 (new fdb-reflection crate) → p2-c001 + p2-c002 in parallel → p2-c004 (REST compiler) → p2-c005 (ArcSwap hot-reload). Post-MVP = p2-c007 (OpenAPI) + p2-c006 (pgvector). Key workspace deps to add: sqlx 0.8, deadpool-postgres 0.14, jsonwebtoken 9, reqwest 0.12. Security gates: no JWT values in logs, EncryptedDek ciphertext only, SET LOCAL inside transaction.
